import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { MinistryHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <MinistryHomepage
    ministryName="Ministry of Revenue"
    intro="Collects taxes and administers revenue policy for Ethiopia."
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    services={[
      { href: '/file-return', label: 'File a tax return' },
      { href: '/pay-fee', label: 'Pay a fee' },
      { href: '/register-business', label: 'Register a business' },
    ]}
    news={[
      { href: '/news/1', label: 'New filing deadline announced' },
      { href: '/news/2', label: 'Office hours extended for tax season' },
    ]}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

A ministry's home — a breadcrumb back to the [National Portal](national-portal-homepage),
a plain-language intro, its services, and its own news.

```tsx
import { MinistryHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

<MinistryHomepage
  ministryName="Ministry of Revenue"
  intro="Collects taxes and administers revenue policy for Ethiopia."
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  services={services}
  news={news}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this for any ministry-level homepage, linked from the
[National Portal Homepage](national-portal-homepage).

## Accessibility & localization

- The breadcrumb names both "Home" and the ministry, and the ministry
  name is also the page's one `<h1>`.
- Search is scoped to the ministry (`aria-label` distinguishes it from
  the national portal's own search).
- `intro`, `services`, and `news` are all translated content passed in by
  the caller.

## Plain HTML

Reuses [Header](/docs/components/header#plain-html),
[Breadcrumb](/docs/components/breadcrumb#plain-html),
[Search](/docs/components/search#plain-html), and
[Footer](/docs/components/footer#plain-html)'s markup, laid out with the
same grid utility as the
[National Portal Homepage](national-portal-homepage#plain-html). See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/ministry-homepage.md#html-example)
for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `ministryName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `intro` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onSearch` | `(query: string) => void` | No |
| `services` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `news` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<MinistryHomepageLabels>` | No |
